title: Enhanced Audio (Sound Pack)
description: Changes Minecraft's sounds with a new style of more realistic sounds.
body:
## About
This resource pack changes Minecraft's sounds with a new style of realistic and simple sounds that I like. It **currently adds 637 new sounds** to Minecraft with more to come in the future.

If you would like ambient sounds check out: [Enhanced Audio: Ambience](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-audio-ambience)

## Compatibility
If it says it's incompatible. **Don't worry it will still work**.

![COMPATIBILITY MSG](https://i.imgur.com/x5yK29l.png)

I have tested this resource pack with older versions of Minecraft, **it supports versions 1.10 all the way to the latest release**. It may even work with older versions but with noticeable inconsistencies.
